joke:
Why did the ghost get dumped?  
He kept *haunting* her dating profile!

Why did the banana go to the doctor?  
He wasn't peeling well!

Why did the penguin break up with the iceberg?  
He said it was too *cold* for him!

Why did the stapler file for divorce?  
It said its marriage was *falling apart*!

Why did time get arrested?  
Because it kept *flying* when it saw a cop!

Why did the planet break up with the sun?  
It needed some space!

Why did the artist break up with the canvas?  
It said the relationship was too one-dimensional!

Why did the boat break up with the ocean?  
Because it was tired of being *sunk* by commitment!

Why did the philosopher break up with the void?  
It said the relationship was too... empty!

Why did the lamp break up with the socket?  
It said the relationship was too... *shocking*!

Why did the audience member break up with the comedian?  
They said the relationship was too... *specific*!

Why did the topic break up with the comedian?  
It said the relationship was too... restrictive!

Why did nothing break up with something?  
It said the relationship was too... substantial!
Why did the math book look so sad? Because it had too many problems!

Why did the comedian break up with the audience?  
Too many restrictions!

Why did the joke break up with the punchline?  
It said the setup was too long-winded!

Why did the comedian break up with the audience?  
They kept demanding something *completely different*—but everything’s been taken!

Why did the comedian break up with the audience?  
They kept demanding something *completely different*... but everything’s been taken!

Why did the last topic quit?  
It was the only one left standing!

Why did the audience member ask for a joke about nothing?  
Because they'd already rejected everything else!

Why did the audience ask for a joke about nothing?  
Because they'd already rejected everything else!

Why did the audience ask for a joke about nothing?  
Because they'd already rejected everything else!

Why did the audience member ask for a joke about nothing?  
Because they’d already rejected everything else!

Why did the audience member ask for a joke about nothing?  
Because they’d already rejected everything else!

Why did the audience member stop asking for jokes?  
They finally ran out of topics to reject!
Because you've rejected every possible topic!
Because you've rejected every possible topic!
Because you've rejected every possible topic!

Why did the impossible request break up with the comedian?  
It said the relationship was... *untenable*!

Why did the word 'different' break up with the comedian?  
It said the relationship was too... *repetitive*!
